name: Applicant 1869
rejection_reason: GENERIC_WRONG_DOC

name: Muhammad Naeem
rejection_reason: GENERIC_UNREADABLE

name: Abid Hussain
rejection_reason: IT and product support background (L2 Support Specialist at Techvity, IT intern at CARE International). Less than 1 year of any development-sector work, all at intern or junior support level. No M&E experience, no enumerator management, no education sector field coordination.

name: Adil Javed
rejection_reason: Tehsil Monitoring Officer at WHO (5 years) — health/polio campaign monitoring, not education sector M&E. No school-based field research experience, no enumerator team management, no survey firm oversight. KPK-based (Mardan) — relocation to Islamabad required.

name: Afaq Ahmad
rejection_reason: Entry-level social mobilizer and WWF field assistant with approximately 14 months total experience. No education sector M&E, no enumerator management, no survey firm oversight. BS Forestry background. Gilgit-Baltistan based — relocation to Islamabad required.

name: Amina Jabin
rejection_reason: Entirely teaching background — Class Teacher, Subject Teacher, and Volunteer Teacher at primary and secondary schools (Chitral/Rawalpindi). MPhil in Education (NUML). No M&E experience, no field coordination, no data collection or research role.

name: Midhat Fatima
rejection_reason: Public health surveyor with intern-level experience only. No education M&E, no field team management, no enumerator supervision experience. Entirely health-sector focused. Profile was initially over-scored at 86.2 by automated screening; human assessment placed at 49.

name: Muhammad Afzaal
rejection_reason: Community mobilizer background. No M&E tools used in practice — Kobo/ODK listed in skills section only, without any CV evidence of actual field deployment. No enumerator supervision, no education sector experience.

name: Muhammad Qasi
rejection_reason: Small-scale KII researcher based in Gilgit-Baltistan. No field team management at any meaningful scale, no enumerator supervision, no education sector context. Does not meet minimum requirements for operational field coordination.

name: PARIYAL FAZAL SHAH
rejection_reason: Only 2 years of experience as an M&R (Monitoring & Reporting) analyst — desk-based role focused on internal reporting, not operational field coordination. No evidence of enumerator management, survey firm oversight. Profile was initially over-scored at 93.8 by automated screening; human assessment placed at 62.

name: syeda farzana ali shah
rejection_reason: 25+ years of experience in child protection, safeguarding, and gender programming — an entirely different domain from field research coordination. No M&E, no field data governance, no education sector research background. Expected salary PKR 300,000 is also over budget.

name: Shahid Kamal
rejection_reason: M&E Officer (Karishma Ali Foundation) and LUMS RA background shows field M&E experience, but the scale of operations is unclear and the role appears closer to NGO grant management than front-line field coordination. Insufficient evidence of managing large-scale enumerator operations.

name: Sana Mehboob
rejection_reason: District M&E Officer at Balochistan Rural Support Programme (~20 months) in WASH and rural community development — not education sector M&E. No evidence of managing school-based field research, enumerator teams, or education data quality oversight.

name: Shabbir Hussain
rejection_reason: PhD Sociology with community mobilization and public health research background. Field experience limited to social mobilization (AKRSP, 5 months) and academic research at university level. No education sector M&E, no enumerator management, no survey firm oversight.

name: Jalal Ud Din
rejection_reason: Community development and awareness background without demonstrated field research coordination, data quality oversight, or enumerator management experience in an education context.

name: Wajeeha rehber
rejection_reason: Sociology research background with 6-month field evaluation (US Embassy project) and ~14 months as research assistant. No evidence of managing large-scale enumerator teams, survey firm oversight, or school-based education data governance. Experience is primarily academic.
